verdict: Campaign is paused with weak lead flow, but purchase revenue still beats spend nearly 5-to-1.
diagnosis: Spend of $1,249 produced only 2 leads at $624 each — far above the $98 wellness benchmark, while purchases delivered $5,897.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads in 28 days
signals.detail: Lead volume is critically low against $1,249 spend, signaling a tracking gap or broken intake path.

signals.headline: Purchase revenue hit $5,897
signals.detail: Nine purchases generated nearly 5x the ad spend, suggesting the offer converts when traffic lands.

signals.headline: 846 clicks, 138 landing page views
signals.detail: Roughly 1 in 6 clicks actually loaded the page — a major drop-off worth investigating.

signals.headline: Main search campaign is paused
signals.detail: The BWS Search Campaign is currently off, which explains flat recent impressions and click activity.

signals.headline: Zero call clicks from Google Business
signals.detail: For a senior safety product with a phone-based audience, zero profile calls is a missed channel.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.body: Consumer wellness leads average around $98, with broader healthcare landing near $120. At $624 per lead this period, Liferun is paying roughly 6x the category norm.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Senior safety demand steady in spring
seasonal.body: Medical alert and senior care searches hold steady through late spring. Summer travel season often lifts family-driven inquiries for aging parents living alone.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.body: Assisted living and elder care click costs jumped about 32% year over year. Competitors are bidding aggressively on terms like 'life alert,' squeezing smaller advertisers.

recommendations.title: Audit lead tracking before relaunching paid spend
recommendations.detail: Only 2 leads against 846 clicks suggests broken conversion tracking or form issues. Consider verifying pixel fires and form submissions before turning campaigns back on.

recommendations.title: Test a call-focused campaign for the 65+ audience
recommendations.detail: The Google Business profile shows zero call clicks despite a listed phone number. Worth testing call extensions and call-only ads given the senior demographic.

recommendations.title: Shift budget toward the purchase-converting path
recommendations.detail: Purchases returned $5,897 on $1,249 spent. Consider reallocating to whichever ad set or keyword drove those nine sales rather than lead-focused variants.
